meta.title: Sound Key to Operator Cross-Reference
meta.purpose: Bridges the Black Fairy Sound Key Matrix (QF/MS/BE/DF/TH) with the Aetherion Operator Bank. These are the same functional layer — what you sound and what you say to shift state, clear role, and exit field. Neither system is primary. Both are valid. Use whichever layer you need in the moment.
meta.principle: Sound Key = somatic entry point. Operator = linguistic seal. Together: full-spectrum governance.

sound_key_operator_map.name: Quiet Flame
sound_key_operator_map.use: Calm authority · pre-launch focus · re-entry preparation · boundary conversations

operators.timing: Before entering any high-stakes space — launch, conversation, public re-entry

operators.line: El-es ri es sa rus de en.
operators.ipa: /ˈe.les ɾi es sa ɾus de en/
operators.timing: When identity pressure is coming from outside — after QF settles the body
When the full name seal is needed. The complete QF-mode operator.

sound_key_operator_map.sequence: Sound QF → breathe → En es en. → (if deeper seal needed) El-es ri es sa rus de en. → close: ◇ En es en. Ellari.
sound_key_operator_map.note: QF is the base layer. Use it before any other key or operator sequence.

sound_key_operator_map.name: Mirror Seal
sound_key_operator_map.cue: Glass tap · sub bass · whisper: Seen. Sealed.
sound_key_operator_map.use: Perception control · mirror work · image locking · final naming decisions

operators.timing: Primary MS operator — the name as mirror seal
Deep mirror work — identity verification mode. Rarely. Only when the question is real.

operators.line: En mel-a ki sa triem es luma.
operators.ipa: /en ˈme.la ki sa ˈtri.em es ˈlu.ma/
operators.gloss: I say that the triad is bright.
operators.timing: After mirror work — naming what you saw. Classification closes the loop.

sound_key_operator_map.sequence: Sound MS → glass tap → ◇ En es en. Ellari. → (if triad analysis needed) En mel-a ki sa triem es luma/dala.
sound_key_operator_map.note: MS is the seal key. It locks what QF opens. Use in pairs: QF to enter, MS to seal.

sound_key_operator_map.name: Black Exit
sound_key_operator_map.use: Social exit · role exit · symbolic closure · boundary enforcement

operators.timing: Before the exit — the declaration that precedes the action
The exit action itself — past completive means it is already done
Full field exit — when it is not just a role but the whole relational container
When the exit is from a triangulated relational structure

sound_key_operator_map.sequence: Tone drop → silence → Lo es rola de Ellari. → En del-te rola. Ellari. → (if field exit needed) En dam-te fa rolem. Ellari. → heel click → done.
sound_key_operator_map.note: BE is not angry. It is clean. The heel click is the physical seal — the body completing what the voice started. No explanation follows.

sound_key_operator_map.name: DNA Flame

operators.delivery: Plain — not ceremonial, not performed. Just true.
operators.timing: The base DF operator. Simple. Absolute. Repeat if needed.

operators.line: El-es ri es sa rus de en.
operators.ipa: /ˈe.les ɾi es sa ɾus de en/
operators.delivery: ◇ Solemn — with the heartbeat still present
operators.timing: When recovery needs to name what was not taken
DF closes here — the full return. The name is the completion.

sound_key_operator_map.sequence: Heartbeat cue → breath → En es en. → (let it land) → El-es ri es sa rus de en. → ◇ En es en. Ellari. → breath release.
sound_key_operator_map.note: DF is the recovery key. Not urgency — return. It activates from the inside out. The operator does not command. It remembers.

sound_key_operator_map.name: Too Hot
sound_key_operator_map.use: Reveal moments · teaser activations · product seal hits · named truth moments

operators.line: En mel-a kan sa triem es luma.
operators.ipa: /en ˈme.la kan sa ˈtri.em es ˈlu.ma/
operators.gloss: I affirm as fact that the triad is bright.
operators.delivery: ◇ Solemn — the factive. This is not opinion. This is declaration.
operators.timing: The reveal moment — when something is named as true and that naming is the act
TH identity reveal — the name as the spark itself

operators.line: Var-a en sa rola vi sa triem.
operators.ipa: /ˈva.ɾa en sa ˈɾo.la vi sa ˈtri.em/
operators.gloss: I see the role in the triad.
operators.timing: When the TH moment is naming something about a situation, not just self

sound_key_operator_map.sequence: Click → bass hit → (silence) → En es Ellari. OR En mel-a kan sa triem es luma. → hush.
sound_key_operator_map.note: TH is the sharpest key. Use it deliberately. A TH moment that isn't real collapses on itself. The operator must match the actual energy of the moment — not performed, not anticipated.

full_sequence_protocols.description: Before any public activation — content drop, product launch, press moment
sequence: QF → En es en. → El-es ri es sa rus de en.
DF → breathe → En es en. (once more, plain)

full_sequence_protocols.description: When leaving a role, relationship container, or dynamic
sequence: BE → Lo es rola de Ellari. → En del-te rola. Ellari.
(if full field) → En dam-te fa rolem. Ellari.
MS → ◇ En es en. Ellari. (seal the exit)

full_sequence_protocols.description: After collapse, breach, or loss of self-contact
sequence: DF → En es en. (repeat until it lands)
QF → El-es ri es sa rus de en.
(if triad assessment needed) → En mel-a ki sa triem es luma/dala.

full_sequence_protocols.description: MIRRORBODY™ competition protocol — from session summary
sequence: Morning — QF: ◇ En es en. Ellari.
Getting ready — DF: El-es ri es sa rus de en.
Travel — DF anthem with Kaltra EQ
Backstage — BE: Lo es rola de Ellari. / En del-te rola. Ellari.
Pump room — DF: En es en.
On deck — full: Es en Ellari. (High Voice — only here)
